ns0:entry.ns0:title: Anil-matcha/Open-Generative-AI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Anil-matcha/Open-Generative-AI
Language: javascript
Open-source alternative to AI video platforms — Free AI image & video generation studio with 200+ models (Flux, Midjourney, Kling, Sora, Veo). No content filters. Self-hosted, MIT licensed.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: GoogleChrome/lighthouse
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/GoogleChrome/lighthouse
Language: javascript
Automated auditing, performance metrics, and best practices for the web.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: JiyaBatra/CODEVIBE-
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JiyaBatra/CODEVIBE-
Language: javascript
CodeVibe is an interactive learning platform designed to help beginners understand programming through simple lessons and hands-on practice. It includes structured course sections, coding examples, and a built-in HTML compiler that lets users write and test code directly in the browser, making learning web development practical, engaging.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: affaan-m/ECC
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/affaan-m/ECC
Language: javascript
The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jarrodwatts/claude-hud
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jarrodwatts/claude-hud
Language: javascript
A Claude Code plugin that shows what's happening - context usage, active tools, running agents, and todo progress

ns0:entry.ns0:title: liyupi/ai-guide
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/liyupi/ai-guide
Language: javascript
程序员鱼皮的 AI 资源大全 + Vibe Coding 零基础教程，分享 OpenClaw 保姆级教程、大模型玩法（DeepSeek / GPT / Gemini / Claude）、最新 AI 资讯、Prompt 提示词大全、AI 知识百科（Agent Skills / RAG / MCP / A2A）、AI 编程教程（Harness Engineering）、AI 工具用法（Cursor / Claude Code / TRAE / Codex / Copilot）、AI 开发框架教程（Spring AI / LangChain）、AI 产品变现指南，帮你快速掌握 AI 技术，走在时代前沿。本项目为开源文档，已升级为鱼皮 AI 导航网站

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pbakaus/impeccable
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pbakaus/impeccable
Language: javascript
The design language that makes your AI harness better at design.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ryanmcdermott/clean-code-javascript
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ryanmcdermott/clean-code-javascript
Language: javascript
Clean Code concepts adapted for JavaScript
